events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing primer/wrong cement means the PVC joints haven't achieved proper solvent-weld fusion — a code and manufacturer-instruction violation (NEC 110.3(B), Art. 352.10/352.48). Decision is `fail`, medium risk; corrective action is to stop joint-making on the affected run, cut out and remake non-conforming joints with correct primer/cement, and re-inspect before closing in. Unaffected rigid metal conduit work (Art. 344) can continue in parallel.
